subcodes.first_line: O Ḥusayn! We have heard thy call, and thy petition hath been read before the Divine Throne. God willing, from the outpourings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حسین ندایت را شنیدیم و عریضه ات لدی العرش قرائت شد انشاء الله از فیوضات
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
